## Summary

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Data pipeline
- [ ] Feature engineering
- [ ] Modeling
- [ ] Explainability
- [ ] Business scoring
- [ ] API
- [ ] Monitoring
- [ ] Tests/CI

## Validation

- [ ] `make check` passes
- [ ] Relevant script was run locally
- [ ] Reports or README were updated
- [ ] No raw data, processed data, trained model artifacts, virtual environments, or large HTML reports are staged

## Data Science Review

- [ ] No fake metrics were added
- [ ] Accuracy is not used as the main metric
- [ ] Leakage risk was considered
- [ ] Business interpretation and limitations are documented
